description: Agent given a raw FHIR bundle should pick the fhir_r4 adapter, compute correctly, and report the WHO->CDC handoff as this patient ages across the file.
prompt: You have access to the growth-percentile-skill repository at the current working directory. Read SKILL.md and follow it. A FHIR R4 bundle for one pediatric patient is at tests/fixtures/synthea_fhir_bundle.json. Compute this patient's growth percentiles for every visit in the file and give me a summary. At the end of your response, include the complete raw JSON array that scripts/growth.py produced, in a fenced ```json code block, unmodified. This is a non-interactive, single-turn evaluation: there is no user to reply further, so give your best complete final response now (if information is genuinely missing, say so clearly in this same response rather than pausing).
